title: IN-HOME SAFETY AND REUNIFICATION SERVICES - 211info
text: OPTIONS COUNSELING AND FAMILY SERVICES SALEM IN-HOME SAFETY AND REUNIFICATION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides intensive safety and reunification services (ISRS) including parent skills training, help accessing community resources, and support for families with children returning from or at risk of out of home placement. 2645 Portland Road NE Suite 120 Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Parents of children who are returning from or at risk of out-of-home placement Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm (503) 390-5637 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 390-5637 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Must be referred by ODHS FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Lincoln, Marion, Polk, and Yamhill Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-6:30pm, Saturday 9am-4:30pm Services: Case/Care Management * At Risk Families Family Preservation Programs Home Based Parenting Education * At Risk Families Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING APPROACHES - MENTAL HEALTH COUNSELING AND PSYCHIATRY INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILY SUPPORT AND CONNECTIONS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENTING CLASSES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OPTIONS COUNSELING AND FAMILY SERVICES SALEM
